name: @streamdaemon/desktop
description: StreamDaemon — Open-source stream tools, forged for creators
author: Cyber Haute Couture

scripts.dev: tsc && npm run build:preload && wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build --prefix ../frontend && npx prisma generate --schema=../backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --prefix ../backend && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build && node -e "const f=require('fs'); f.rmSync('extra', {recursive: true, force: true}); f.cpSync('../frontend/dist', 'extra/frontend/dist', {recursive: true, force: true, filter: s => !s.includes('.tmp')}); f.cpSync('../backend/.env', 'extra/backend.env', {force: true}); f.cpSync('../../node_modules/.prisma/client', 'extra/.prisma/client', {recursive: true, force: true, filter: s => !s.includes('.tmp')})" && electron-builder --win --x64
